versions.version_description: Accurate, easy acoustic strum version. Needs a capo on the second fret to match recording.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I Can’t Tell You Why chords (for acoustic guitar)
The Eagles  1980

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/I_Can%27t_Tell_You_Why

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  4x *

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Look at us baby, up all night [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Tearing our love apart [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Aren’t we the same two people who lived [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                  
through years in the dark? [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Ahh ah [/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]F#7[/ch]
Every time I try to walk away [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]F#7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Something makes me turn around and stay [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And I can't tell you why [/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
When we get crazy, [/tab]

it just ain't right, 
 
(try to keep you head, little girl) 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Girl, I get lonely, too [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
You don't have to worry [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
Just hold on tight [/tab]

(don't get caught in your little world) 
[tab]        [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Cause I love you [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]F#7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Nothing's wrong as far as I can see [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]F#7[/ch]
We make it harder than it has to be [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
and I can't tell you why [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]
no, baby, I can't tell you why [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I can't tell you why [/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]  2x

break

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]F#7[/ch]
Every time I try to walk away [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#7[/ch]
Something makes me turn around and stay [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
And I can't tell you why [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#7[/ch]
no, baby, I can't tell you why [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I can't tell you why [/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I can't tell you why[/tab]

[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] . . . .

* Alternate:

Capo II

[ch]Bm[/ch]  = [ch]Am[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]   = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]   = [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]   = [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]F#7[/ch] = [ch]E7[/ch]

Set8
